analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,300–$77,100 on May 1 (avg ~$76,800). Up +2.07% in 24h after dip to $75,500. Resistance at $78,500; support holding above $76,000. 74% of altcoins still in the red despite BTC recovery.
sentiment_key_signals: BTC +2% in 24h — recovery from $75,500 overnight low
74% of crypto coins lost value in 24h — broad market weakness persists
ETF outflow: $138M net outflow on Apr 29 — single-day headwind
ETF inflow: $2B net inflow for April total — monthly trend remains bullish
FOMC held 3.5%–3.75% on Apr 29 — rates steady, no new shock
Resistance at $78,500 — key level for trend reversal confirmation
Senate Clarity Act markup scheduled May 2026 — regulatory tailwind
BlackRock IBIT continues leading institutional demand
North Korea-linked hacks ~$577M in 2026 YTD — security headwind
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held rates at 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 — already priced in. ISM Manufacturing today (medium impact). Next major catalyst: NFP May 8, CPI May 12, PPI May 13. No FOMC until Jun 16-17.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): BTC up +2% with strong monthly ETF inflows, but single-day ETF outflow and weak altcoin breadth (74% down) cancel bullish signals. Mixed picture warrants neutral. Bot filter INACTIVE — confidence 0.40 < 0.50 threshold.
